question: Design a `Book` class with private members for title (string), author (string), and price (double). Include a parameterized constructor to initialize these members and a public method `displayBookInfo()` to print all details.

test_cases.expected:
Title: The Alchemist
Author: Paulo Coelho
Price: $11.50

test_cases.input:
To Kill a Mockingbird
Harper Lee
9.75
test_cases.expected:
Title: To Kill a Mockingbird
Author: Harper Lee
Price: $9.75

test_cases.input:
The Catcher in the Rye
J.D. Salinger
14.00
test_cases.expected:
Title: The Catcher in the Rye
Author: J.D. Salinger
Price: $14.00

Title: Validated Price Book
Author: Developer
Price: $0.00
